name: lastfm-mcp
description: Scrobble tracks and albums, manage loved songs, view listening stats
long_description:
Connect Claude to your Last.fm account. Scrobble individual tracks or full albums (timestamps calculated automatically), mark tracks as loved, and browse your listening history and charts.

SETUP (takes ~2 minutes):
1. Get a free Last.fm account at https://www.last.fm/join if you don't have one
2. Register a free API app at https://www.last.fm/api/account/create
   - Fill in any name/description, leave Callback URL and Homepage blank
   - Copy your API key and Shared secret from the confirmation page
3. Run lastfm_authorize with your api_key and api_secret — your browser will open
4. Click Allow access on Last.fm, then run lastfm_authorize with check_status=true

Just ask Claude to help you get set up and it will walk you through every step.

tools.name: lastfm_authorize
tools.description: Set up and authorize Last.fm. Run this first — guides you through every step.

tools.name: lastfm_auth_status
tools.description: Check whether Last.fm is connected and which account is active

tools.name: lastfm_scrobble_album
tools.description: Scrobble a full album with auto-calculated timestamps

tools.name: lastfm_update_now_playing
tools.description: Set the now-playing indicator on your profile

tools.name: lastfm_unlove_track
tools.description: Remove loved status from a track

tools.name: lastfm_get_top_tracks
tools.description: Get your most-played tracks by time period

tools.name: lastfm_get_top_artists
tools.description: Get your most-played artists by time period

tools.name: lastfm_get_top_albums
tools.description: Get your most-played albums by time period

tools.name: lastfm_search_track
tools.description: Search the Last.fm catalogue for a track
